name: BBQ Trout
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the soy sauce, cooking sherry, lemon juice, crushed garlic, and salad oil.
2. Use a hand mixer to blend all ingredients well until smooth.
3. Brush the prepared marinade onto the trout inside and out to preserve freshness before refrigerating.
4. Place the 2 trout (10 to 12 inch fish) in a shallow baking dish.
5. Pour the remaining marinade over the fish, ensuring it is evenly coated.
6. Let stand for one hour to allow the flavors to penetrate the fish.
7. Preheat your grill and place the trout on the hot surface.
8. Cook until done, approximately 15 minutes, basting with the reserved marinade during cooking.
9. Turn off the heat once the trout is cooked through and serve.
